title: sanger-tol/busco pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

fasta.errorMessage: Assembly path is mandatory and must not contain whitespace

lineage.description: Name of the ODB lineage to run BUSCO on. The pipeline defaults to the global --lineage parameter.

outdir.errorMessage: Output directory for this assembly. Per-lineage sub-directories will be created under it. The pipeline defaults to the global --outdir parameter.
